/CAL:PTD PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/FAVRPT/X:DEFENDANT HAS COMPLETED 9 OF 24 THINKING FOR A CHANGE CLASSES, HAS NOT COMPLETED ANY PARENTING CLASSES & PTDIS STILL LOOKING INTO VICTIM RESTITUTION/CONT/DOPU:PTD/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/FAVRPT/X:DEFENDANT ENTERS INTO AN INFORMALDIVERSION PLEA/CPSS/CTORD:INFORMAL DIVERSION PERIOD BEGINS TODAY AND WILLLAST FOR A TOTAL OF 6 MONTHS/CTORD:DEFENDANT MUST NOT PICK UP ANY NEW CHARGES,MUST NOT SUFFER ANY ADDITIONAL VIOLATIONS OF THE CPO; REMAIN IN GOOD STANDING IN DEPENDENCY COURT/CTORD:DEFENDANT MUST COMPLETE A THINKING FOR ACHANGE COURSE, 10 PARENTINGCLASSES AND PAY RESTITUTION/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PTD TO MONITOR THE INFORMAL DIVERSION REQUIREMENTS/CONTD:INFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:PTD/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED WHICH AMENDS COUNT 2 TO REFLECT A MISDEMEANOR CHARGE OF PC 487(A) & ADDS A COUNT 5, PC 243(E)1 PC, AMISDEMEANOR/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/ORMS/GTWM/987,2/SA1:JACQUELINELOPEZ/SAORD3/SAORD/X:COURT CHECKS BOX 16 AND 16 ON THE CPO/CONTD:PRETRIALCONFERENCE/SB:2 HOURS/
/CAL:PTD PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/FAVRPT/CONTD:PTD PROGRESS REPORT & POSSIBLE EXTENSION OF INFORMAL DIVERSION/DOPU:PTD/
